overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of an empty gothic grand hall with dark wood paneling and warm chandelier lighting. The video transitions between two static views: first showing the dining area with a large far window, then cutting to the opposite end featuring a prominent wall clock and tiered wooden seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with long tables and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing the grand hall interior from the entrance area facing the far window

entered.detail: large arched window with blue moonlight filtering through at the far end of the hall
long wooden dining tables with white tablecloths arranged in rows
elaborate iron chandeliers with multiple candles hanging from the vaulted ceiling
large patterned area rug covering the wooden floor in the foreground
dark wooden paneled walls with vertical beams and wall-mounted lanterns

segments.scene_description: A static view of an empty gothic dining hall illuminated by warm chandelier light. The camera faces a large arched window at the far end, with dining tables arranged in the center and dark wood paneling lining the walls. No movement or characters are present in the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: assembly hall with tiered seating and large wall clock

events.description: camera cuts to opposite end of hall revealing large wall clock and tiered wooden benches

agents.ego_description: stationary camera focused on the clock wall and tiered seating area at the opposite end of the hall

entered.detail: prominent circular clock with roman numerals mounted above double doors on the far wall
rows of elevated wooden benches and tables arranged in stepped tiers facing the center
large dark wooden doors situated directly beneath the wall clock
three tall narrow windows with blue glass on the left wall showing night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the opposite end of the grand hall, focusing on a large wall clock above wooden double doors. Tiered wooden benches occupy the center of the frame, and tall windows line the left wall. The lighting remains consistently warm from the chandeliers, and the hall remains empty of people.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an empty gothic grand hall that shifts from a view of the dining area to the opposite end of the room. It begins facing a large arched window at the far end of the hall, where dining tables are arranged beneath the warm glow of chandeliers and dark wood paneling. As the perspective pivots, the scene transitions across the expanse of the room to reveal the opposite side of the hall. The view then opens up to focus on a large wall clock positioned above wooden double doors, with tiered wooden benches occupying the center and tall windows lining the left wall. The lighting remains consistently warm throughout the movement, maintaining a still and desolate atmosphere as the camera settles on the far end of the architecture.
